summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 10.8°C) and outside temperature (down 10.6°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 10%).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 328 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 21 miles), cloud levels (up 216 m), and outside humidity (down 5%) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; cold temperatures are forecasted. Also, dry and less humid conditions and mostly calm with light air movement. Chance of light rain, low clouds are expected, possibly some fog or persistent clouds, and the light is absent. The weather will likely remain the same.
